item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 96 pts (0.457) Buffalo Sabres – 95 pts (0.446) Tampa Bay Lightning – 91 pts (0.44) Montreal Canadiens – 86 pts (0.415) Boston Bruins – 86 pts (0.41) Pittsburgh Penguins – 86 pts (0.41) Columbus Blue Jackets – 85 pts (0.405) New York Islanders – 85 pts (0.399) Detroit Red Wings – 84 pts (0.4) Ottawa Senators – 81 pts (0.391) Philadelphia Flyers – 80 pts (0.386) Washington Capitals – 79 pts (0.371) New Jersey Devils – 72 pts (0.348) Florida Panthers – 71 pts (0.343) Toronto Maple Leafs – 71 pts (0.333) New York Rangers – 65 pts (0.31) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
